items.title: Grades for every team eliminated from the World Cu...
items.summary: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how its run compared with expectations.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: De la Fuente says Spain have recaptured 2010 spirit after France masterclass
items.summary: Spain, who won Euro 2024, has now equalled Italy’s record of 37 consecutive unbeaten matches, but the team coach De la Fuente said his players still had ‌room to grow
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'This is our victory:' Alex Eala receives hero's welcome at Malacañang
items.summary: No Filipino athlete has received a warmer homecoming this year than tennis sensation Alexandra Eala.
